description_long: This is a modern, freestanding digital library kiosk designed for public urban environments. The kiosk features a predominantly red and white color scheme with bold graphics and branding for 'PUBLIC LIBRARY' and 'Intelligent Mobile DigiLib.' The front and rear panels each have a large digital display screen, interactive touch panels, and clear instructions for users to select and retrieve digital library materials. The main side panel includes a set of visible slots or compartments, likely for dispensing or returning items, and a secondary screen for user interaction. The structure is boxy with a flat roof, slightly angled side panels, and robust construction, suggesting durability for outdoor or high-traffic use. Prominent signage, digital displays, and interactive elements make it highly visible and user-friendly in public spaces.
description: A modern, red and white digital library kiosk with interactive screens, bold signage, and multiple access panels for public use.
description_view_0: This view shows a red panel with a large digital display, a touch interface, and clear instructions for choosing and retrieving items.
description_view_1: The main side features prominent 'PUBLIC LIBRARY' branding, a digital display, and a large interactive panel with multiple slots for item dispensing.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side has a digital display, touch interface, and instructions, but with different screen content and directional graphics.
description_view_3: This view highlights the main interactive side with multiple item slots, a digital screen, and bold library branding.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and digital signage; large printed 'PUBLIC LIBRARY' and 'Intelligent Mobile DigiLib' logos above the main panel, digital display screens on front and rear, instructional graphics and icons on all sides.
attribute_door_configuration: Single access panel with item slots and a touch interface on the main side; no traditional doors visible.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with slight overhangs and angular side extensions; appears to be made of metal or composite panels.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, utilitarian with bold graphics and minimal decorative elements.
